nodes.context: American outlaw motorcycle club formed in Boise, Idaho in 1969, active in Idaho, Washington, and Oregon.
Outlaw motorcycle club; associated with Brother Speed for methamphetamine precursor chemicals and drug transport.
Motorcycle club allegedly associated with Brother Speed for acquiring methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
Motorcycle club allegedly associated with Brother Speed for acquiring methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
Australian motorcycle club; Brother Speed allegedly sent methamphetamine to them in Sydney.
Outlaw motorcycle club based in Texas; Brother Speed formed an alliance with them in the early 1990s.
White supremacist organization; Brother Speed purchased illegal weapons from its members in northern Idaho.
Motorcycle club based in Pocatello, Idaho; members were attacked by Brother Speed members in May 2012.

edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.
edges.context: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Hells Angels to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.

edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.
edges.context: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Outsiders to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.

edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.
edges.context: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Devils Breed to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.

edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Speed in Idaho have allegedly been involved in sending methamphetamine, sealed inside the frames of motorcycles, to the Rebels in Sydney, Australia.
edges.context: Brother Speed allegedly sent methamphetamine to Rebels in Sydney.

edges.evidence_quote: Fearing that their operations would be taken over by the Hells Angels, the Brother Speed strengthened by beginning an alliance with the Bandidos of Texas in the early 1990s.
edges.context: Brother Speed formed an alliance with Bandidos in early 1990s to counter Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: The club has purchased illegal weapons from members of Aryan Nations in northern Idaho.
edges.context: Brother Speed purchased illegal weapons from Aryan Nations members.

edges.evidence_quote: In May 2012, five of the Idaho Falls members of Brother Speed, attacked two members of Pocatello's Empties motorcycle club at a gathering for a child who was suffering from cancer.
edges.context: Brother Speed members attacked Empties members in May 2012.
